folio.label: 99v
folio.l: Betú pacient , and ther of I ©ow preye
¢ I haue q¶ she , seid thus , and euäe shal
I wol no thyngö , ne nyl no thyngö certeyn
But as ©ow list , nougút greuetú me at al
Thougú that my dougúter , & my sone be slayn
At ©oure comaundement , that is to slayn
I haue nougút had no part , of children tweyne
But first sykenesse , and after woo and peyne
¢ ñe be my lord , dotú witú ©oure owyn thynge
Rigút as ©ow list , asketú no reed of me
For as I left at home , al my clothynge
Whan I first cam to ©ow , rigút so q¶ she
Lefte I my wylle , and my liberte
And toke ©oure clothynge , wherfore I ©ow preye
Dotú ©oure plesaunce , I wol ©oure lust obeye
¢ And certes if I had had , prescience
ñoure wyl to knowe , or ©e ©oure lust me tolde
I wold it douö , witú outen negligence
But now I wot ©oure lust , and what ©e wolde
Al ©oure plesaunce , ferme and stable I holde
For wyst I , that my detú , mygút do ©ow eese
Rigút gladly wold I deye , ©ow to please
¢ Detú may nat make , no comparisone
Vn to ©oure loue , and whan this MakysMarkysMarkys say
The constaunce of his wyf , he cast a doune
Hise eyen two , and wondretú that she may
In pacience suffre , al this array
And fortú he gotú , witú drery countenaunce
But to his herte , it was rigút gret plesaunce
¢ This vgly Sergeau~t , in the same wyse
That he hire dougúter caugút , rigút so he
Or werse , if men can werse deuyse
Hatú hent hire sone , that ful was of beaute
And euäe in oone , so pacient was she
That she no chere made , of heuynesse
But kyst hire sone , and after gan hi~ blisse
¢ Saue this she preyed hi~ , if that he mygút
Hire lytel sone , he wolde in erthe graue
Hise tendre lymes , delicat to sigút
Fro foules and fro bestes , for to saue
But she noon answere , of hi~ mygút haue
He went his wey , as hi~ no thyngö ne rougút
But to Boloigne , he it tenderly brougút
¢ This Markys wondretú , euäe lengere the more
Vp on hire pacience , and if that he
Ne had sotúly , knowen ther byfore
